changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO ludo_user ( id, display_name, email, avatar_index, avatar_version, time_zone ) VALUES ( '598ccbea-4957-4569-81cb-ea901b62c329', 'Demo User', 'demo@ludocode.app', 1, 'v1', 'UTC' ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO code_languages (slug, name, editor_id, piston_id, base, icon_name, extension, initial_script) VALUES ('python', 'Python', 'python', 'python', 'script', 'Python', '.py', 'print("Hello, world!")') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO course (id, title, description, img_src, request_hash, course_type, subject_id, code_language_id) SELECT '75975805-3f02-43c2-9106-c990d944dfd2', 'Python', 'Simple and Versatile language', NULL, '6873b087-9f85-4f1d-8bc9-04a84e704a29', 'COURSE', s.id, cl.id FROM tags s JOIN code_languages cl ON cl.slug = 'python' WHERE s.slug = 'python' ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO module (id, title, order_index, is_deleted, course_id) VALUES ( 'a99d4abd-895f-4a4b-b4ea-570fac609f6f', 'Hello World!', 1, false, '75975805-3f02-43c2-9106-c990d944dfd2' ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO lesson (id, title, is_deleted) VALUES ( '7eeaaddd-2d87-495e-bd40-24cfd9f06b4b', 'Print Statements', false ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO module_lessons (module_id, lesson_id, order_index) VALUES ( 'a99d4abd-895f-4a4b-b4ea-570fac609f6f', '7eeaaddd-2d87-495e-bd40-24cfd9f06b4b', 1 ) ON CONFLICT (module_id, lesson_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO lesson_exercises (lesson_id, exercise_id, exercise_version, order_index) VALUES ('7eeaaddd-2d87-495e-bd40-24cfd9f06b4b', 'fd00de96-49ef-4bed-8bd7-2a05ff1b1393', 1, 1), ('7eeaaddd-2d87-495e-bd40-24cfd9f06b4b', 'c8229944-d5f1-4e67-b9b3-87b9c9e90852', 1, 2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO career_preferences (id, choice, title, description, course_id) VALUES ( 'd5a7e3b9-8c41-4f2d-b6a9-3e1c7f92a4d6', 'DATA', 'Data Science', 'Explore data science and artificial intelligence', '75975805-3f02-43c2-9106-c990d944dfd2' ) ON CONFLICT (choice) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_preferences (user_id, has_experience, chosen_path_id, chosen_course_id) VALUES ( '598ccbea-4957-4569-81cb-ea901b62c329', false, 'd5a7e3b9-8c41-4f2d-b6a9-3e1c7f92a4d6', '75975805-3f02-43c2-9106-c990d944dfd2' ) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO course_progress (user_id, course_id, current_module_id, is_complete) VALUES ( '598ccbea-4957-4569-81cb-ea901b62c329', '75975805-3f02-43c2-9106-c990d944dfd2', 'a99d4abd-895f-4a4b-b4ea-570fac609f6f', false ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, course_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO subscription_plan ( id, plan_code, display_name, stripe_price_id, display_price, description, currency, billing_interval, is_active, created_at ) VALUES ( '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'FREE', 'Free', 'price_1T1XKU70FW11rZbtkkYVKREY', 0.00, 'Get started with the basics', 'EUR', 'month', true, now() ), ( '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222', 'SUPPORTER', 'Supporter', 'price_1T1Csb70FW11rZbt5moXBJoY', 5.99, 'Unlock skill paths and additional credits', 'EUR', 'month', true, now() )

changeSet.author: dave
dave
